value.found_quote: Codex | AI Coding Partner from OpenAI | OpenAI ... A coding agent that helps you build and ship with AI—powered by ChatGPT.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's official Codex product page. It clearly presents Codex as a currently available offering ("Try Codex today"), describes its features, lists it under OpenAI's Products navigation, and includes a promotional offer ("Earn up to $500 in credits for your team when they start using Codex"), all indicating it is an active, generally available product.
